title: Mapei MAPEGUM WPS Fast Drying Tanking Membrane 5 Kg -Mapei 124805
description: IDEABRIGHT LTD DESCRIPTION Mapei 124805 Mapei MAPEGUM WPS 5 KG Fast drying flexible liquid tanking membrane for the interior waterproofing of bathroom and shower walls and floors before installing ceramic tiles and natural stone. Also suitable for kitchen floors, walls and counter tops before installing ceramic tiles. COVERAGE: approx. 1.5 kg/m2 per mm of thickness. END OF IDEABRIGHT LTD DESCRIPTION
features: COVERAGE: approx. 1.5 kg/m2 per mm of thickness.
